violations.text: Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. Per PIC, tubing will be separated. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
